title: hieracium bifidum subsp. oligograptum
intro: Hieracium bifidum subsp. oligograptum is a subspecies of Hieracium bifidum, also known as a type of hawkweed, a flowering plant native to various parts of the world. The plant is believed to possess medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms associated with gastrointestinal issues. It is also considered to have several health benefits, including acting as an anti-inflammatory agent and having antioxidant properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Hieracium bifidum subsp. oligograptum is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and sometimes dried and made into capsules or tablets for consumption.
